# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Prepare artifact bundle
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist-artifacts/binaries
          mkdir -p dist-artifacts/config
          mkdir -p dist-artifacts/scripts
          if [ -d "build" ]; then cp -R build/. dist-artifacts/binaries/; fi
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then cp -R dist/. dist-artifacts/binaries/; fi
          if [ -d "config" ]; then cp -R config/. dist-artifacts/config/; fi
          if [ -d "deployment" ]; then cp -R deployment/. dist-artifacts/scripts/; fi
          if [ -d "scripts" ]; then cp -R scripts/. dist-artifacts/scripts/; fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: internal-build-artifacts
          path: dist-artifacts
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 30
